name: @auto-no-mous/copilot-web
description: Framework-agnostic embeddable copilot SDK and browser loader

scripts.build: node ./node_modules/tsup/dist/cli-default.js src/index.ts src/loader.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --clean && node ./node_modules/tsup/dist/cli-default.js src/loader.ts --format iife --global-name AutoNoMousCopilotLoader --out-dir dist/browser --minify

author: Auto-no-mous AI
